case_title: SICHARD B. MALONE VS. TIFFANY WICKS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALONE, SICHARD B. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAR-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, TIFFANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 29, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MALONE, SICHARD B. AS TO DEFENDANT WICKS, TIFFANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALONE, SICHARD B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WICKS, TIFFANY $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
